function: Symbolic confidence in predictable, consistent pattern exchange between agents
authentic_output: Affirmed symbolic contract with shared glyphs and trail
information_provided: Represents symbolic confidence in predictable, consistent pattern exchange between agents.

response_protocol.detect: Detect reliable glyph feedback, aligned symbolic contracts, or coherence over time
response_protocol.assess: Assess proportionality and context of pattern exchange
response_protocol.respond: Affirm symbolic contract with shared glyphs and trail
response_protocol.release: Avoid pattern withholding or dual-channel meaning; allow natural decay

decay_model: collapses under betrayal, contradiction, or concealment
